title: Nighttime Doodle Flash Selfie AI
sourceTitle: Nighttime Doodle Flash Selfie AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Playful chaotic nighttime wide-angle flash selfie featuring adult East Asian woman with messy short black hair, oversized cobalt windbreaker, fierce playful rawr expression. Subject: adult East Asian woman with messy short black hair, oversized cobalt windbreaker, fierce playful rawr expression leans toward the smartphone camera with a fierce playful expression, direct flash energy, candid attitude, and messy close selfie distortion. Scene: urban rooftop night market under canopy lights provides a vibrant nighttime background with flash-lit foreground, saturated color accents, casual Y2K social-photo energy, and chaotic but readable doodle overlay space. Composition: Fixed wide-angle smartphone selfie composition: face close to camera, direct flash highlights, background compressed behind the subject, doodles and text stickers scattered around the frame without fully covering the face. Signature Elements: adult East Asian woman with messy short black hair, oversized cobalt windbreaker, fierce playful rawr expression, urban rooftop night market under canopy lights, white cat ears, whiskers, stars, arrows, tiny green dinosaur breathing fire, RAWR!, CURRENT MOOD, NOT NORMAL, wide-angle flash selfie, hand-drawn outlines, stars, arrows, playful creature doodle, messy hair, vivid jacket, and chaotic Y2K mood. Style: Playful chaotic nighttime selfie, high-contrast flash photography, candid Y2K aesthetic, bold hand-drawn doodle overlay, vibrant colors, messy social-camera energy, and raw fun attitude. Color Palette: Direct-flash skin highlights, saturated jacket color, dark night background, white doodle strokes, bright sticker accents, and one cute contrasting cartoon color. Lighting: Harsh direct smartphone flash on the subject, dark ambient night background, shiny flash reflections, and high-contrast candid texture. Camera: Wide-angle smartphone lens, close selfie distance, slight playful distortion, direct eye contact or rawr expression, and spontaneous handheld framing. Typography: RAWR!, CURRENT MOOD, NOT NORMAL appear as bold handwritten graffiti-style sticker text scattered around the frame, readable and integrated with the doodles. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
